region_id: GLOBAL
scope_note: Worldwide, cross-regional, or international-system-level geographic scale.
use_when: Use for worldwide, cross-regional, or international-system-level records when no specific geographic region is primary.
do_not_use_when: Do not use merely because an international organization such as the UN or ICJ appears; store organizations in organization_ids.
example_original_terms: 世界;各国;諸外国;world;foreign countries;worldwide opinion
notes: UN and ICJ should be handled with organization_ids. Use GLOBAL only when the record's geographic scale is worldwide or cross-regional.

region_id: AFRICA
scope_note: African continent and African countries or territories, including colonial and pre-independence territories.
use_when: Use for Africa/African countries/territories, China-Africa files, Afro-Asian records, or records framing North African states as part of Africa.
do_not_use_when: Do not use only because a country has African diaspora relevance; for Middle East framing of Egypt, use MIDEAST and possibly NORTH_AFRICA.
example_original_terms: アフリカ;アフリカ諸国;中近東アフリカ諸国;Africa;African countries
notes: Use with african_independence_dates.csv to judge whether countries were independent at the record date.

region_id: NORTH_AFRICA
scope_note: Northern African states and territories such as Egypt, Libya, Tunisia, Algeria, Morocco, and sometimes Sudan depending on source framing.
use_when: Use when a record specifically concerns North African countries or when Egypt/Libya/Algeria appear in Middle East-North Africa contexts.
do_not_use_when: Do not use for all Africa records automatically.
example_original_terms: 北アフリカ;エジプト;リビア;アルジェリア;チュニジア;モロッコ
notes: Can be combined with MIDEAST for Arab-Israeli or Middle East conflict records.

region_id: SUBSAHARAN_AFRICA
scope_note: Africa south of the Sahara, especially when distinguished from North Africa.
use_when: Use when the record explicitly distinguishes sub-Saharan Africa or concerns countries south of the Sahara as a region.
do_not_use_when: Do not apply automatically to every African country; use AFRICA for broader records.
example_original_terms: サハラ以南;ブラック・アフリカ;熱帯アフリカ;Sub-Saharan Africa
notes: Historical Japanese terms such as ブラック・アフリカ require caution and should be preserved in original_terms.

region_id: SOUTHERN_AFRICA
scope_note: Southern African region including South Africa, Namibia/South West Africa, Angola, Mozambique, Rhodesia/Zimbabwe, Zambia, etc. depending on context.
use_when: Use for apartheid, Namibia/South West Africa, Rhodesia/Zimbabwe, Angola/Mozambique liberation, and southern African conflict/decolonization contexts.
do_not_use_when: Do not use for South Africa alone unless the record frames it regionally.
example_original_terms: 南部アフリカ;南阿連邦;南西アフリカ;ローデシア;アンゴラ;モザンビーク
notes: Useful with political_status_at_time and historical_area_ids.

region_id: MIDEAST
scope_note: Middle Eastern or Near Eastern region, including West Asia and sometimes Egypt/North Africa when the source frames them as Middle Eastern.
use_when: Use for 中東, 中近東, 近東, Arab-Israeli conflict, Lebanon, Gulf states, Iran-Iraq conflict, and Middle East question files.
do_not_use_when: Do not use for all Muslim-majority countries automatically; use the source framing.
example_original_terms: 中東;中近東;近東;中東問題;中近東アフリカ諸国;Middle East;Near East
notes: Egypt may be MIDEAST;NORTH_AFRICA rather than AFRICA when the file is about Middle East conflict.

region_id: ASIA
scope_note: Broad Asia-related records or Asian countries collectively.
use_when: Use for Asia-wide records, Asian countries as a group, and Afro-Asian conference records.
do_not_use_when: Do not use as the only region when a narrower subregion is clearly the main subject.
example_original_terms: アジア;アジア諸国;中国・アジア諸国;Asia;Asian countries
notes: Often combined with AFRICA for Asian-African Conference records.

region_id: EAST_ASIA
scope_note: East Asian countries and political entities, especially China, Japan, Korea, Taiwan, and Mongolia.
use_when: Use for China, Japan, Korea, Taiwan, Mongolia, and East Asian diplomacy when regionally framed.
do_not_use_when: Do not use merely because PRC/ROC appears in a global UN record unless East Asia is a meaningful geographic dimension.
example_original_terms: 東アジア;極東;中国;日本;韓国;北朝鮮;台湾;モンゴル;Far East
notes: Preserve original terms such as 中国 separately; entity interpretation belongs in interpreted_entity_ids.

region_id: SOUTHEAST_ASIA
scope_note: Southeast Asian countries and regional diplomacy.
use_when: Use for Indonesia, Burma/Myanmar, Thailand, Laos, Cambodia, Vietnam, Malaysia, Singapore, Philippines, ASEAN, and Bandung host context if needed.
do_not_use_when: Do not use for all Afro-Asian records unless Southeast Asia is specifically relevant.
example_original_terms: 東南アジア;南東アジア;インドネシア;ビルマ;タイ;ラオス;カンボディア;ヴィエトナム;ASEAN
notes: Useful for PRG/Vietnam UN participation files and Bandung/Indonesia-centered files.

region_id: SOUTH_ASIA
scope_note: South Asian countries and regional diplomacy.
use_when: Use for India, Pakistan, Ceylon/Sri Lanka, Nepal, Afghanistan, and South Asian positions in Bandung or UN diplomacy.
do_not_use_when: Do not use for Middle East or Southeast Asia records.
example_original_terms: 南アジア;インド;パキスタン;セイロン;ネパール;アフガニスタン
notes: Afghanistan may be SOUTH_ASIA in older diplomatic groupings depending on source framing.

region_id: ASIA_PACIFIC
scope_note: Asia-Pacific regional diplomacy and Pacific-facing diplomatic/security records.
use_when: Use for explicit Asia-Pacific or Pacific regional framing, including Asia-Pacific overseas mission chiefs meetings.
do_not_use_when: Do not use for all Asia records.
example_original_terms: アジア太平洋;アジア・太平洋;太平洋;Pacific;Asia-Pacific
notes: May include Australia and New Zealand in Pacific-oriented diplomatic groupings.

region_id: OCEANIA
scope_note: Oceania and Pacific island or Australasian regional context.
use_when: Use for Australia, New Zealand, Pacific island states, or Oceania-specific records.
do_not_use_when: Do not use when Australia/New Zealand appear only as members of a wider Asia-Pacific or Commonwealth grouping unless regionally relevant.
example_original_terms: オーストラリア;ニュー・ジーランド;太平洋諸国;Oceania;Pacific
notes: ASIA_PACIFIC may be better for Japan-centered regional diplomacy.

region_id: AFRO_ASIA
scope_note: Cold War Afro-Asian political and diplomatic space.
use_when: Use for Bandung, Asian-African Conference, AAPSO, Afro-Asian solidarity, and Asia-Africa diplomatic framing.
do_not_use_when: Do not use merely because one Asian and one African country appear without Afro-Asian framing.
example_original_terms: アジア・アフリカ;アジア・アフリカ諸国;Afro-Asian;Asian-African
notes: A geopolitical/diplomatic region rather than a physical region.

region_id: EUROPE
scope_note: European countries and European diplomacy broadly.
use_when: Use for Europe-wide records or European states when the file is regionally framed.
do_not_use_when: Do not use for every mention of France/UK/Germany if Europe is not a meaningful subject.
example_original_terms: 欧州;ヨーロッパ;Europe;西欧;東欧
notes: Use WESTERN_EUROPE or EASTERN_EUROPE when the source distinguishes them.

region_id: WESTERN_EUROPE
scope_note: Western European countries and regional diplomacy, especially EC/NATO-era Western Europe.
use_when: Use for 西欧, EC, France, UK, Italy, Spain, Benelux, West Germany in Western European diplomatic grouping.
do_not_use_when: Do not use for all Europe records; use only when western European framing is explicit.
example_original_terms: 西欧;EC;フランス;イギリス;イタリア;スペイン;西独
notes: For West German diplomacy, region_ids may be EUROPE;WESTERN_EUROPE.

region_id: EASTERN_EUROPE
scope_note: Eastern European countries, especially Cold War-era socialist Eastern Europe excluding or including USSR depending on source wording.
use_when: Use for 東欧, ソ連東欧諸国, Czechoslovakia, Poland, Hungary, Yugoslavia, Bulgaria, Albania, etc. when regionally framed.
do_not_use_when: Do not use for SOCIALIST_BLOC as a political bloc without geographic East Europe relevance; that belongs in bloc_ids.
example_original_terms: 東欧;ソ連東欧諸国;チェコ;ポーランド;ハンガリー;ユーゴスラヴィア;ブルガリア;アルバニア
notes: SOCIALIST_BLOC should be a bloc_id, not a region_id.

region_id: AMERICAS
scope_note: North, Central, South America and Caribbean countries when grouped as the Americas.
use_when: Use for 米州, Western Hemisphere, or records grouping Canada, US, Latin America, and Caribbean countries.
do_not_use_when: Do not use if the file is specifically about the United States; use NORTH_AMERICA then.
example_original_terms: 米州;アメリカ州;カナダ;メキシコ;ブラジル;ペルー;ウルグアイ;Western Hemisphere
notes: Useful for ICJ election regional vote files.

region_id: NORTH_AMERICA
scope_note: North American region, especially United States and Canada in Japan's North America Bureau contexts.
use_when: Use for US politics, Japan-US relations, Canada, or North America-centered records.
do_not_use_when: Do not use for Latin America or all Western Hemisphere records.
example_original_terms: 北米;米国;カナダ;日米関係;United States;Canada;North America
notes: For 米国政治 files, region_ids should be NORTH_AMERICA even when foreign-policy sections cover other regions.

region_id: LATIN_AMERICA
preferred_label_jp: ラテンアメリカ・中南米
scope_note: Latin American countries, including Central and South America and sometimes the Caribbean depending on source framing.
use_when: Use for 中南米, Latin America, and records involving Nicaragua, El Salvador, Brazil, Peru, Uruguay, Paraguay, Argentina etc. in regional context.
do_not_use_when: Do not use for United States/Canada-centered records unless Latin America is a substantive subject.
example_original_terms: 中南米;ラテンアメリカ;ニカラグア;エルサルバドル;ブラジル;ペルー;ウルグアイ;アルゼンティン
notes: CENTRAL_AMERICA may be added when Nicaragua/El Salvador are specifically central.

region_id: CENTRAL_AMERICA
scope_note: Central American countries and conflicts.
use_when: Use for Nicaragua, El Salvador, Guatemala, Honduras, Costa Rica, Panama, Belize, or Central America as a diplomatic/security region.
do_not_use_when: Do not use for Latin America broadly unless Central America is specifically highlighted.
example_original_terms: 中米;ニカラグア;エルサルバドル;米国中米特使;Central America
notes: Useful for US politics/foreign policy files involving Nicaragua and El Salvador.

region_id: CARIBBEAN
scope_note: Caribbean countries and territories.
use_when: Use for Caribbean island states and territories, especially in Latin American voting/attitude files.
do_not_use_when: Do not use for all Latin America records.
example_original_terms: カリブ;カリブ海;ドミニカ;ハイチ;キューバ;Caribbean;West Indies
notes: Can be combined with LATIN_AMERICA.
